business_ideas.idea: Reputation management law firms for blockchain platforms—police identity use, manage creator brands

predictions.text: BitClout prices run up for months, then stabilize; creators migrate back off platform once exit possible
In 5 years BitClout won't exist as reputation casino; decentralized social survives but betting on people dies
Large creators will opt out when downside risk exceeds benefit; reputation too fragile to weaponize long-term
